comments: Approved. The contract scope is explicitly bounded to documentation-only work on README.md and README_zh-CN.md, including injecting a full inventory of the 17 built-in workflows with their triggers/scenarios and adding a deep-dive section on Custom Workflow Authoring for collaborative scenarios, with bilingual parity required. The out_of_scope clause correctly forbids changes to src/mcp-server/, bin/, and active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics, and also blocks runtime execution code changes. allowed_files and stop_conditions are aligned with those boundaries, so the contract is sufficiently constrained for a README-only workflow-enrichment patch.
